free_text: Polarization of 17.8 MeV Protons Scattered by Nuclei.
The Targets were Self-Supporting Foils of Thickness
The 38.4 MeV Alpha-Particle Beam from Cyclotron was
Focussed onto a Gasous Hydrogen Target at 10 Atm
Pressure. Polarized Recoil Protons was Used For this
/by Compiler/.The Authors was not Indicated Level
